experience.title: Information Technology Specialist
experience.description: Automated repeatable tasks where possible to increase efficiency. Consistently received a 100% rate of customer satisfaction. Performed root cause analysis to identify system errors and improve accuracy by 15%. Awarded with the Tech of the quarter for contributions to mission.

experience.title: Systems Engineer
experience.description: Obtained all mission related certification required for the application services provider, within the 24x7 technical support tier. Trained current and new team members on existing and new application services procedure and Commercial off the Shelf (COTS) software.

experience.title: Systems Engineer Associate
experience.description: Coordinated all NEAS weekly brown-bag seminar for the VA-95 Technical Resource Center. Formatted and delivered training specific to the intended party and purpose for company standards.
